name: MQTT
summary: Publish, subscribe and bridge firmware/backend/frontend device commands through MQTT URI routes.
description: MQTT is an external urirun connector. It exposes mqtt:// publish and device:// command-bridge routes. Publishing is a side effect, so routes default to dry-run (returning the publish plan); pass --execute (or mode=execute) to publish, which needs the optional paho-mqtt dependency and a reachable broker.
useCases: Publish a message to an MQTT topic from a URI flow.
Bridge a device command (e.g. turn an LED on) to an MQTT publish.
Project MQTT publish to MCP/A2A so agents can drive devices.
